steps.expression: async () => { const settings = await window.api.settings.getView({ viewKind: 'settings' }); const modelEntry = settings.ok ? Object.entries(settings.value.modelCatalog.modelsByProvider).find(([, models]) => Array.isArray(models) && models.length > 0) : undefined; const modelRefOrNull = modelEntry === undefined ? null : { providerId: modelEntry[0], modelId: modelEntry[1][0] }; return window.api.agents.save({ viewKind: 'agentEdit', id: null, name: `Smoke Agent ${Date.now()}`, systemPrompt: 'You are a helpful planner.', verbosity: null, temperature: null, tags: ['smoke'], modelRefOrNull }); }
async () => window.api.agents.list({ viewKind: 'agentsList', searchText: '', tagFilter: '', archivedFilter: 'all', sortBy: 'updatedAt', sortDirection: 'desc', page: 1 })
